failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: E8gAap
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '422 Unprocessable Entity' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed-batch'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/422","timestamp":"2026-04-13T17:13:42.809190+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model": "sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2", "texts": ["", ""]}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

1. Test Case ID: E8gAap
- Server error
[503] Service Unavailable:
`{"error":"Embedding service error: Client error '422 Unprocessable Entity' for url 'https://vecinita--vecinita-embedding-web-app.modal.run/embed-batch'\nFor more information check: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status/422","timestamp":"2026-04-13T17:13:42.809190+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model": "sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2", "texts": ["", ""]}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/embed/batch

1. Test Case ID: KLDoP8
- Server error
[502] Bad Gateway:
`{"error":"Reindex service request failed: [Errno -2] Name or service not known","timestamp":"2026-04-13T17:14:00.302919+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/scrape/reindex?verbose=false&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: KLDoP8
- Server error
[502] Bad Gateway:
`{"error":"Reindex service request failed: [Errno -2] Name or service not known","timestamp":"2026-04-13T17:14:00.302919+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/scrape/reindex?verbose=false&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

testcase.name: Stateful tests
testcase.error:
Runtime Error
'NoneType' object is not iterable
Traceback (most recent call last): File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/engine/run/stateful/_executor.py", line 225, in execute_state_machine_loop InstrumentedStateMachine.run(settings=hypothesis_settings) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/stateful/state_machine.py", line 280, in run return run_state_machine_as_test(cls, settings=settings) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/stateful/__init__.py", line 42, in run_state_machine_as_test return _run_state_machine_as_test(state_machine_factory, settings=settings, _min_steps=2) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/stateful.py", line 269, in run_state_machine_as_test state_machine_test() File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/stateful.py", line 119, in run_state_machine @given(st.data()) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 2264, in wrapped_test raise the_error_hypothesis_found File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/specs/openapi/stateful/__init__.py", line 339, in inner case = draw(cases) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/internal/conjecture/data.py", line 1205, in draw return unwrapped.do_draw(self) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/strategies/_internal/strategies.py", line 851, in do_draw return data.draw(strategy) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/internal/conjecture/data.py", line 1205, in draw return unwrapped.do_draw(self) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/strategies/_internal/core.py", line 1927, in do_draw return self.definition(data.draw, *self.args, **self.kwargs) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/specs/openapi/_hypothesis.py", line 108, in openapi_cases path_parameters_ = generate_parameter( File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/specs/openapi/_hypothesis.py", line 700, in generate_parameter value, metadata = get_parameters_value( File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/specs/openapi/_hypothesis.py", line 643, in get_parameters_value new = draw(strategy) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/internal/conjecture/data.py", line 1205, in draw return unwrapped.do_draw(self) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/strategies/_internal/strategies.py", line 710, in do_draw result = self.do_filtered_draw(data) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/strategies/_internal/misc.py", line 64, in do_filtered_draw return self._transform(self.value) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/hypothesis/strategies/_internal/strategies.py", line 699, in _transform result = f(element) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/schemathesis/hooks.py", line 308, in wrapper return hook(value) File "/root/GitHub/VECINA/vecinita/backend/tests/schemathesis_hooks.py", line 78, in map_path_parameters out = dict(path_parameters) TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable
